name: Adaptive Fabricator Core Mk5

name: Pack Command Beacon Mk6

name: Aeroelastic Maneuver Web Mk5

name: Oracular Fleetnet Core Mk7

name: Thermal Glide Controller Mk6

name: Magnetic Mine Layer Mk6

name: Antimatter Lance Beam Mk8

name: EMP Flux Mortar Mk6

name: Shaped Charge Barrage Mk5

name: Dark-Matter Seeded Tap Mk8

name: Plasma Sheath Array Mk7
